_meta.purpose: HOME (homeowners) primary-source rate filings — parallel to serff_filings.json (auto). Seeded 07-10, deepened 07-13 (full re-scan of the two automated states). Feeds home/rate-changes/ + rate-filings/ roll-up + home/state highlights.
_meta.sources: CA = CDI Approval/Closed List Excel (LINE CODE HOMEOWNERS MULTI-PERIL). TX = data.texas.gov iubg-btfs (state_type_of_insurance=Homeowners; percent_change has trailing % — strip). Both lack PH/premium. Only TX+CA publish rate-filing open data; all other states are SERFF-manual.
_meta.coverage_note: Recognizable nationals + major regionals + biggest movers per state; TX has 70 carriers with material moves (crisis market) — obscure surplus/fronting carriers omitted.
